segments.text: When they're trying to land their attacks, they gotta approach Zelda
segments.original_text: どうしても自分の技を当てに行くときにゼルダに近づいて

segments.text: and have to deal with her moves
segments.original_text: ゼルダの技と向き合わなければならない

full_text: When they're trying to land their attacks, they gotta approach Zelda and have to deal with her moves But she lands the thunder!
